serviceNotes.engine oil: N46 2.0L; CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km: air filter with every third engine oil service (3 × 30,000 km CBS ceiling).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — EU maximum oil service 30,000 km / 24 months with Long-Life oil. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — interior filter per CBS service display
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — every 2 years; BMW owner's manual E90
serviceSources.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — air filter with each third engine oil change
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — spark plugs with each third engine oil change (90,000 km at 30,000 km oil ceiling)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km inspection planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 30,000 km inspection planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km at oil ceiling)
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: No routine interval in E90 owner literature — REC preventive
serviceSources.xDrive transfer case fluid: BMW specialist consensus; lifetime-fill OEM — REC for xDrive
serviceSources.differential fluids: BMW specialist consensus; lifetime-fill OEM — REC for xDrive
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E90 coolant; REC preventive ~120,000 km
